title: Demo Track
description:
Canonical schema for narrated dashboard demo tracks. Promoted in harmonization Phase 5.1 from the dc-planner format. Each consumer ships its own per-domain track JSON files in `data/demo-tracks/<track>.json` (the engine that consumes them is the shared `shared/js/demo-engine.js`).

A TRACK is one end-to-end narrated walkthrough (e.g. "presales", "onboarding", "engineering"). It contains a sequence of SCENES (typically one scene per dashboard tab). Each SCENE contains a sequence of STEPS. Each STEP has narration text and a list of ACTIONS the engine executes against the dashboard via the agent bridge.

audience.description: Free-text audience descriptor — e.g. "external customer demo", "new hire onboarding", "engineering training".

scenario_url.description: Optional path (relative to the page) to a JSON file containing pre-staged dashboard state to load at track start.

voice.description: Voice configuration for narration. Currently only the browser SpeechSynthesis provider is supported.

preferred_voices.description: Ordered list of preferred SpeechSynthesisVoice names. The engine picks the first one matched on the user's machine.

step_pause_ms.description: Pause inserted between steps before the next action runs.

tab.description: Dashboard tab to navigate to before any step runs (passed to agent bridge `navigate` action).

narration.description: Plain-text narration spoken aloud and shown in the transcript panel. May span multiple sentences; the engine highlights one sentence at a time using SpeechSynthesis boundary events.

action.description: Action object. Types map to functions in `demo-engine.js`. Most actions take a `hook` (the value of a `data-agent-hook` attribute on the dashboard) so the engine can resolve the target via the agent bridge.

hook.description: Value of a `data-agent-hook` attribute on the target element.

duration_ms.description: For `scroll_tour`: scroll duration; "auto" lets the engine compute from height + WPM.

easing.description: For `scroll_tour`: easing curve for smooth scrolling.

parallel.description: If true, this action runs concurrently with the step's narration; otherwise the engine waits for narration to finish before executing.

pause_at_end_ms.description: Extra pause inserted after the action completes.

params.description: Free-form parameter map for action types that need it (e.g. `set_state`).

expect.description: For `assert`: predicate to evaluate after the action chain. Used by the regression harness to detect demo drift.
